title: cheirostylis nuda
intro: Cheirostylis nuda, also known as the naked cheirostylis or naked lipcheirostylis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Diapensiaceae, native to the tropical forests of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. Cheirostylis nuda has been reported to have several health benefits, including the treatment of fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Cheirostylis nuda include decoctions and infusions, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and other medicinal remedies.
